 --0-1635527705-935679369=:11984
 Content-Type: TEXT/PLAIN; charset=US-ASCII
 
 Hi,
 	My name is Douglas A. Maske, I work for a company called Complex
 Commuincations, Inc, in assocation with Insystem, Inc.  We hope from time
 to time to donate many things to the FreeBSD project.  This simple and
 small port is the first, and we are currently developing a port for
 StarOffice 5.x if StarDivision lets us.
 
 Thanks,
 Douglas A. Maske
 CEO & President
 Complex Communcations, Inc.
 http://www.intsyst.com
